name: performance.two_site_bandit_cannibal_wait_30m
description: Performance-audit row: two active hostile overmap AI sites. A bandit camp starts from a persisted remembered camp-map lead while a seeded cannibal_camp sits at the direct-player-range boundary without smoke/fire fields; the scenario waits through the same real 30-minute overmap AI cadence and captures compact live-path timing/counter lines from bandit_live_world perf instrumentation.

steps.label: post_load_two_site_perf_fixture_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for the two-site performance fixture; this is startup/load plus fixture footing only

steps.label: preflight_two_site_bandit_lead_perf_fixture
steps.abort_reason: preflight saved bandit_live_world site did not contain the persisted remembered camp-map lead needed for the bandit half of the two-site performance row
steps.expected_immediate_state: saved bandit_live_world contains the remembered-lead bandit camp with player target player@140,39,0 before the measured live cadence starts; the cannibal half is seeded as an overmap special without smoke/fire fields and must be proven by same-run bootstrap/dispatch/perf artifact lines
steps.failure_rule: If the remembered lead is missing or malformed, later timing cannot be credited to the intended two-site performance row.

steps.label: measure_30_minutes_two_site_bandit_cannibal
steps.pre_menu_expected_visible_fact: alarm/wait mode menu is visible, then Wait a while is chosen before the duration menu
steps.expected_visible_fact: the player waited through a bounded 30-minute overmap AI cadence window with one preflight-proven remembered-lead bandit site and one abstract-bootstrap-proven direct-range cannibal site; performance credit depends on same-run bootstrap, dispatch, perf/debug artifact lines with signals=0, not the wait UI alone
steps.failure_rule: If the wait is interrupted or the artifact delta lacks the two-site perf/cadence lines, this row is inconclusive.

steps.label: audit_two_site_perf_artifact
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not contain compact two-site perf counters and expected bandit remembered-lead plus cannibal direct-range artifact lines
steps.failure_rule: No two-site performance row credit if the same-run artifact lacks the abstract-bootstrap line for the added cannibal site, the perf counter line, and job-identifying lines for both hostile site profiles.

evidence_contract.claim: two active hostile overmap AI sites -- one bandit remembered-lead stalk site and one direct-range cannibal site -- can advance through a real 30-minute live cadence with signals=0 while emitting compact timing/counter evidence
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for performance
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No performance-row credit if startup/load, bandit fixture preflight, bounded wait/cadence action, same-run abstract-bootstrap proof for the added cannibal site, same-run perf counter line, and job-identifying bandit/cannibal artifact lines are not all present and classified separately.
